name: fonglish
description: Fonglish — real-time video call translation with live bilingual subtitles (WebRTC + xAI STT/MT)

scripts.prepare: npm run build -w @fonglish/shared && npm run build -w @fonglish/audio
scripts.gateway: npm run prepare && npm run dev -w @fonglish/gateway
scripts.web: npm run prepare && npm run dev -w @fonglish/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @fonglish/shared && npm run build -w @fonglish/audio && npm run build -w @fonglish/gateway && npm run build -w @fonglish/web
